# Copilot Instructions

Refer to the following files for project context:
- `.agent/system-prompt.md` — Base behavioral instructions
- `.agent/coding-standards.md` — Technical standards
- `.agent/context/tech-stack.md` — Approved technologies
- `.agent/context/architecture.md` — System design

Follow the coding standards defined in `.agent/coding-standards.md`.
Use the memory bank in `.agent/memory/` for project state.
